summary: PICKS Auto-Refresh feature testing COMPLETE. All features working correctly: (1) Backend returns picks[] array in chat response, (2) Pillar auto-switching based on conversation intent - grooming queries return 'care' pillar, birthday queries return 'celebrate' pillar, (3) Frontend correctly processes picks from chat response and updates UI accordingly.
critical_code_review_comments: PICKS Engine integration at line 3665-3700 of mira_routes.py is correctly implemented - runs picks_engine on every chat turn
Response correctly includes: picks[], concierge{}, safety_override{}, missing_profile_fields[]
useChatSubmit.js (lines 715-782) correctly processes picks from data.picks and updates miraPicks state
PersonalizedPicksPanel.jsx correctly supports enginePillar prop for auto pillar switching
Pillar detection works for: grooming → care, birthday → celebrate, travel → travel

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Picks auto-refresh and pillar switching verified via Playwright

context_for_next_testing_agent: PICKS auto-refresh is fully functional. Test by logging in, navigating to /mira-demo, and sending a chat message. Console logs will show: [PICKS ENGINE] Received X picks for pillar: {pillar}. Grooming queries → care pillar, birthday queries → celebrate pillar, travel queries → travel pillar.

picks_auto_refresh.description: Every chat message returns picks[] array in response
picks_auto_refresh.console_evidence: [PICKS ENGINE] Received 8 picks for pillar: care

tests.query: I need grooming for my dog
I want to plan a birthday party for my dog

frontend_picks_panel.description: PersonalizedPicksPanel receives enginePicks and enginePillar from chat response
